= lowercase


== Examples

[,bloblang]
----
root.foo = this.foo.lowercase()

# In:  {"foo":"HELLO WORLD"}
# Out: {"foo":"hello world"}
----

[,bloblang]
----
root.email = this.user_email.lowercase()

# In:  {"user_email":"User@Example.COM"}
# Out: {"email":"user@example.com"}
----
